component.name: MovieLoaderTask
component.script:
sub init() m.top.functionName = "loadMovies" end sub
sub loadMovies() server = m.top.server username = m.top.username password = m.top.password
if server = "" or username = "" or password = "" m.top.error = "Missing Xtream Codes credentials" return end if
' Fetch movie categories categoriesUrl = server + "/player_api.php?username=" + username + "&password=" + password + "&action=get_vod_categories" categories = FetchJson(categoriesUrl)
if categories = invalid m.top.error = "Failed to load movie categories" return end if
' Fetch all movies moviesUrl = server + "/player_api.php?username=" + username + "&password=" + password + "&action=get_vod_streams" allMovies = FetchJson(moviesUrl)
if allMovies = invalid m.top.error = "Failed to load movies" return end if
' Organize movies by category moviesByCategory = {} categoryNames = {}
' Build category name lookup for each cat in categories categoryNames[cat.category_id.toStr()] = cat.category_name end for
' Group movies by category for each movie in allMovies catId = movie.category_id.toStr() catName = categoryNames[catId] if catName = invalid then catName = "Uncategorized"
if moviesByCategory[catName] = invalid moviesByCategory[catName] = [] end if
movieData = { id: movie.stream_id.toStr(), title: movie.name, imageUrl: movie.stream_icon, year: movie.year, rating: movie.rating, categoryId: catId, categoryName: catName, containerExtension: movie.container_extension, url: server + "/movie/" + username + "/" + password + "/" + movie.stream_id.toStr() + "." + movie.container_extension }
moviesByCategory[catName].Push(movieData) end for
m.top.movies = { categories: categories, moviesByCategory: moviesByCategory, totalCount: allMovies.Count() } end sub
function FetchJson(url as string) as object http = CreateObject("roUrlTransfer") http.setUrl(url) http.setCertificatesFile("common:/certs/ca-bundle.crt") http.initClientCertificates() http.setConnectionTimeout(30) http.setReadTimeout(60)
response = http.getToString() if response = "" or response = invalid then return invalid
return ParseJson(response) end function
